R0212.title: V2X Communication Attack
R0212.definition: Attackers hijack vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) communications to send false information interfering with driving decisions.
R0212.description: Attackers hijack vehicle-to-vehicle (V2V) and vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) communications to send false information interfering with driving decisions.
R0212.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
